_note: models_available is the declared env manifest — list the models actually reachable in this environment (e.g. opus, sonnet, deepseek-v4, glm, deepseek-flash). pipeline-preflight.sh fails a phase whose routed model is not listed. Each skill updates artifacts{}/gates_passed/phase on completion; a new session reads this file to resume. human_gates.creator_interview and human_gates.discovery_signoff are enforced inside the discovery skill (Phase -1), recorded here for audit and resume.
_grace_full_note: GRACE Full (docs/*.xml — graph, development plan, verification plan) is ON by default: the graph is the entry to development, not a layer on top of it. Set enabled:false ONLY for a bugfix or a single small edit, and state the reason — otherwise the next session cannot tell whether the graph is absent by decision or by neglect, and will start rebuilding one in its head. See PIPELINE.md §Branch A.
